description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Build that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow should have two jobs: linux-build and windows. The linux-build job runs on a matrix of Ubuntu configurations with GCC and Clang, checking out the repository, installing build dependencies, configuring CMake, and building. The windows job runs on a matrix of Windows configurations with different architectures and build types, checking out the repository, downloading Vulkan headers, configuring CMake, and building.
